name: patchopsiii-electron
description: Electron control center for Call of Duty: Black Ops III maintenance, mod setup, and performance tuning.
author: boggedbrush

scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run build:main && vite build
scripts.dist: bun run build && bun x electron-builder@26.8.1
scripts.build:backend:linux: bun scripts/check-backend-build.ts linux && .venv/bin/python -m PyInstaller --onefile --name patchops-backend --distpath dist/backend --workpath build/pyinstaller --specpath build/pyinstaller --hidden-import uvicorn.logging --hidden-import uvicorn.loops --hidden-import uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan.on backend/api.py
scripts.build:backend:win: bun scripts/check-backend-build.ts win && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m PyInstaller --onefile --name patchops-backend --distpath dist/backend --workpath build/pyinstaller --specpath build/pyinstaller --hidden-import uvicorn.logging --hidden-import uvicorn.loops --hidden-import uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan.on backend/api.py
scripts.dist:linux: bun run build && bun run build:backend:linux && bun x electron-builder@26.8.1 --linux AppImage --publish never
scripts.dist:win: bun run build && bun run build:backend:win && bun x electron-builder@26.8.1 --win dir --publish never --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-windows-zip.ps1
